title: ALLCPR Smart Manikin / AUTOCPR / ICPIS SOP
purpose_en: Inspect, prepare, document, and escalate Smart Manikin site issues safely and consistently.
purpose_zh: Inspect, prepare, document, and escalate Smart Manikin site issues safely and consistently.

en: Each site should be inspected at least once per week.
Increase frequency if ALLCPR notifies, students complain, or there is a site abnormality.
zh: Each site should be inspected at least once per week.
Increase frequency if ALLCPR notifies, students complain, or there is a site abnormality.

en: Before any cleaning or organizing, take site photos.
zh: 在开始清洁或整理前，先拍现场照片。
整个房间
Smart Manikin 区域
耗材 / 用品区域
门或路牌/指示牌
异常 / 问题区域（如有）

en: Cleanliness: check overall hygiene, empty trash, replace the bag if needed, and keep the floor clean.
Supplies: disinfecting supplies are enough for one week; wipes, gloves, and mask adaptors are stocked.
Equipment: Smart Manikin, iPad, AED Pads, BVM, and Pocket Mask are complete, working, and in standard positions.
Power: iPad / tablet is present and charging; iPad and Smart Manikin are connected to power cables.
Access / camera / Wi-Fi / signage / safety: door access normal, camera online/not blocked, Wi-Fi normal, signs clear, no visible water/electric/equipment hazards.
zh: 卫生：检查整体清洁，清理垃圾，保持地面干净。
耗材：确认消毒用品够用一周；湿巾、手套、面罩转接头充足。
设备：检查 Smart Manikin、iPad、AED Pads、BVM、Pocket Mask 是否齐全、正常并摆放在标准位置。
供电：iPad / tablet 在现场并在充电；iPad 与 Smart Manikin 已连接电源线。
门禁 / 摄像头 / Wi-Fi / 路牌 / 安全：门禁正常、摄像头在线且未遮挡、Wi-Fi 正常、指示清楚、无可见水/电/设备安全隐患。

en: If an issue can be safely fixed on site, fix it and document what you did.
If it cannot be fixed on site, take photos and report to ALLCPR promptly.
zh: If an issue can be safely fixed on site, fix it and document what you did.
If it cannot be fixed on site, take photos and report to ALLCPR promptly.

en: After all inspection and cleaning work is complete, take site photos again.
Keep photo angles as consistent as possible with the before photos.
If an issue was fixed, take a photo of the corrected result.
zh: 完成所有巡检与清洁整理后，再次拍现场照片。
拍照角度尽量与巡检前照片一致。
整个房间
Smart Manikin 区域
耗材 / 用品区域
门或路牌/指示牌
如果处理了问题，拍一张修复结果照片。

en: Header: site name, site address, ICPIS / inspector name, inspection date, inspection time.
iPad / tablet is present and charging
AED pads / BVM / pocket mask are present
Camera is online and not blocked
Required photos: room overview, Smart Manikin area, supplies area, entrance/signage.
Issues found: no/minor/urgent issue, description, action taken, ALLCPR support yes/no.
Local promotion update and weekly confirmation.
zh: Header: site name, site address, ICPIS / inspector name, inspection date, inspection time.
Site is clean
Trash has been removed
Disinfecting wipes / supplies are available
Smart Manikin is in place
iPad / tablet is present and charging
AED pads / BVM / pocket mask are present
Door / lockbox / access code works
Camera is online and not blocked
Wi-Fi appears normal
Signs / instructions are clear
Required photos: room overview, Smart Manikin area, supplies area, entrance/signage.
Issues found: no/minor/urgent issue, description, action taken, ALLCPR support yes/no.
Local promotion update and weekly confirmation.

en: Upload to the corresponding per-site Google Drive folder.
The app records upload completed but does not manage Google Drive; confirm correct folder with staff.
zh: Upload to the corresponding per-site Google Drive folder.
Before photos
After photos
Completed Weekly Site Check Report
Issue photos, if any
Recommended: same day after inspection.
The app records upload completed but does not manage Google Drive; confirm correct folder with staff.

en: Do not dismantle or repair Smart Manikin, iPad, camera, access control, electrical, outlet, or network equipment without authorization.
If an issue cannot be solved on site, take photos and report to ALLCPR immediately.
Inspection records and photos must be real and complete. Do not use old or staged photos.
zh: Do not dismantle or repair Smart Manikin, iPad, camera, access control, electrical, outlet, or network equipment without authorization.
If an issue cannot be solved on site, take photos and report to ALLCPR immediately.
Inspection records and photos must be real and complete. Do not use old or staged photos.

equipment_placement.source_note_en: Figure 1 is a source-backed layout reference only; no image analysis or repair inference.
equipment_placement.source_note_zh: Figure 1 is a source-backed layout reference only; no image analysis or repair inference.
en: Keep manikins plugged in throughout the course
Keep Smart Manikin / iPad in standard position
Bag-Valve Mask / BVM optional; use if mask adaptors are unavailable
zh: 训练设备：iPad、Manikins、AED Training Pads。
全程保持 Manikins 插电。
耗材：纸巾 / 模拟纱布、消毒湿巾、一次性手套、Mask adaptors、Face shield（可选）。
急救通气设备：Pocket Mask；Bag-Valve Mask / BVM 可选。
保持 Smart Manikin / iPad 标准位置并检查电源线。

table_station_precheck.intro_en: Before moving anything, take before photos, then use the table/station placement reference to compare and confirm each item.
table_station_precheck.intro_zh: Before moving anything, take before photos, then use the table/station placement reference to compare and confirm each item.
table_station_precheck.if_problem_en: If an item is missing or has a problem: mark it Missing/Problem, take a photo if safe, write a short note, include it in the Weekly Site Check Report, and report to ALLCPR if it cannot be fixed on site. Do not invent a replacement or repair, and do not dismantle equipment.
table_station_precheck.if_problem_zh: 如某项缺失或有问题：标记为缺失/问题，安全时拍照，写简短说明，写入每周分点巡检表；无法现场解决的上报 ALLCPR。不要臆造替代品或维修，也不要拆卸设备。
en: Tissues / simulated gauze present if supplied
Face shield present if supplied / optional
Items in standard placement / not scattered
zh: iPad 在现场
Smart Manikin / 假人在现场
AED Training Pads 在现场
耗材区域在现场
纸巾 / 模拟纱布如有配置应在现场
消毒湿巾在现场
一次性手套在现场
Mask adaptors 在现场
Face shield 如有配置应在现场
Pocket Mask 在现场
BVM / 球囊面罩在现场
iPad 已连接电源
Smart Manikin 已连接电源
物品按标准位置摆放，没有明显散乱

acknowledgement.body_en: Before photos must be taken before any cleaning or organizing. After photos must be taken after the site is fully arranged. Inspection records and photos must be real and complete. Do not use old or staged replacement photos.
acknowledgement.body_zh: Before photos must be taken before any cleaning or organizing. After photos must be taken after the site is fully arranged. Inspection records and photos must be real and complete. Do not use old or staged replacement photos.
